pattern.styleContract: Cool lavender portrait proof with pet-comfort cues, real studio session evidence, aubergine ink, marine blue fields, mint action, raspberry proof accents, and a portrait gallery hero as the signature move.

tagline: Portrait days for pets with big personality.

hero.title: BrightPaw pet portrait photography hero image
hero.alt: A calm dog posing on a studio platform while a photographer adjusts softbox lighting for a pet portrait session.

contact.serviceArea: Pet portrait sessions, senior pet keepsakes, puppy milestones, multi-pet portraits, holiday card portraits, and pet-forward brand sessions in Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, Maple Bend, and nearby homes or studios

copy.heroTitle: Portraits for pets with big personality.
copy.heroText: Slow, treat-friendly studio sessions catch the tiny looks that make your pet unmistakably yours.
copy.introTitle: Calm studio sessions for nervous pets.
copy.introText: We plan for treats, breaks, favorite sounds, and the little head tilt your pet saves for people they trust.
copy.processTitle: A calmer path to camera-ready pets
copy.proofTitle: Proof your pet can relax here
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to plan a portrait day?
copy.quoteText: Book the next step with pet type, age, personality notes, and a few favorite photo examples. We will suggest the gentlest session style and the easiest date window.

services.title: Personality Session
services.text: One pet, one expressive setup, a gentle pace, and enough treat breaks to keep ears, tails, and attention working with us.

services.title: Keepsake Portrait Day
services.text: Senior pets, shy pets, or milestone sessions with slower pacing, soft posing, and extra time for favorite blankets or toys.

services.title: Tiny Brand Set
services.text: A clean set for trainers, groomers, pet boutiques, or creators who need polished pet-forward images without a giant production.

process.title: Send the pet notes
process.text: Tell us personality, age, energy, coat color, favorite rewards, and any handling needs before the session.

process.title: Set the studio pace
process.text: We start with easy poses, short breaks, and sounds or toys that keep the pet comfortable.

process.title: Choose the keepers
process.text: You get a clear gallery path, simple retouch notes, and delivery guidance for prints, cards, or web use.

proof.label: favorites selected with clear use notes

brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic gallery-led recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: Treat breaks: built into every session.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Share pet type, age, temperament, mobility or handling notes, favorite rewards, family grouping needs, location preference, and a few portrait examples you like.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Tell us personality, age, energy, coat color, favorite rewards, and any handling needs before the session.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Calm-consult flow for Pet portrait sessions, senior pet keepsakes, puppy milestones, multi-pet portraits, holiday card portraits, and pet-forward brand sessions in Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, Maple Bend, and nearby homes or studios: temperament, comfort, rewards, groupings, and location fit shape the portrait day.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For pet portrait photography studio, pet temperament, mobility, favorite rewards, location comfort, family groupings, session pace, and proof timing are set before a portrait path is picked.
